# External ADK Workflow Samples Registry

Source type: `external`

External source:

- Upstream: `https://github.com/google/adk-python/tree/v2/contributing/workflow_samples`

This registry covers ADK 2.0 Workflow samples from the `google/adk-python`
`v2` branch. External entries must point to web URLs, not to local downloads.

## Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `workflow-catalog.yaml` | Workflow sample directories and primary reusable patterns |
| `*.md` | General descriptions only; do not duplicate structured records |
